title: The WesterosCraft Modpack
description: This Modpack includes everything you need to explore the WesterosCraft creative server or start your own Westeros or medieval themed experience
body: --- ![Metallic text that says WesterosCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d915ab2b8f9e0f3a3cb6dd5e90179aa4668151.png) ## Explore the world of Westeros inside Minecraft This modpack includes everything you need to explore the [WesterosCraft](https://westeroscraft.com/) creative server or start your own Westerosi or medieval themed creations. ![Kings Landing made in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728f755596662a82f0ac0bc33fc3a63548ef7a79.jpeg) Explore a meticulously crafted virtual realm inspired by George R.R. Martin's epic fantasy world. From King's Landing to Winterfell, our immersive Minecraft server offers a stunning, player-driven recreation of the Seven Kingdoms. ## Wander through iconic locations: Explore the grandeur of King's Landing, from the Red Keep to the bustling Flea Bottom. Traverse the icy plains beyond the Wall. Unwind in the sun-drenched fields of Highgarden, or climb the perilous cliffs of Casterly Rock. Visit hundreds of holdfasts, towns, and landmarks from the pages of _A Song of Ice and Fire_, all brought to life in hand-crafted detail. - Attention to detail: Every castle, town, and landscape feature is crafted to be as accurate to the books as possible. - Custom-built modpack: WesterosCraft features a curated selection of mods that enhance the experience without straying from the lore. This includes WesterosBlocks, our custom block mod that adds 1500+ new blocks to the game. - Regular updates: The world is constantly evolving, with new locations and features added all the time. ![The Wall from A Game of Thrones made in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9792babcafa0e3aafe04fc60e5dd26656ee42c57_0.webp) ## The modpack contains: - WesterosBlocks Fabric - Distant Horizons - Axiom - Mod Menu - Iris - Bliss Shaders - LambDynamicLights ## Performance stuff like - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - ImmediatelyFast - Sodium + Sodium Extra Also a single player world of Kings Landing so you can see all our pretty blocks. Report issues on our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/pBS5TH4) _WesterosCraft is a free, volunteer fan project not affiliated in any way with GRRM, Mojang, or HBO._
